summary: Representative #54380 is obsolete because it is already closed and replaced by #73799. #73799 is the current open canonical PR for the legacy Word/OLE binary MIME guard, with #54176 kept open as the linked bug until the fix lands. No close, merge, or fix PR actions are planned: the duplicate PR candidates are already closed, merge/fix/post-merge close are disabled for this job, and the linked security item is quarantined out of scope.
